query: SELECT tabela, estabelecimentoId, origemSistema, total FROM (SELECT 'unificados' as tabela, estabelecimentoId, origemSistema, COUNT(*) as total FROM atendimentos_unificados GROUP BY estabelecimentoId, origemSistema UNION ALL SELECT 'sem_conta' as tabela, estabelecimentoId, origemSistema, COUNT(*) as total FROM atendimentos_sem_conta GROUP BY estabelecimentoId, origemSistema UNION ALL SELECT 'a_faturar' as tabela, estabelecimentoId, origemSistema, COUNT(*) as total FROM atendimentos_a_faturar GROUP BY estabelecimentoId, origemSistema UNION ALL SELECT 'warleine_staging' as tabela, estabelecimentoId, 'WARLEINE' as origemSistema, COUNT(*) as total FROM warleine_atendimentos_staging GROUP BY estabelecimentoId) ORDER BY tabela, estabelecimentoId
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT tabela, estabelecimentoId, origemSistema, total FROM (SELECT 'unificados' as tabela, estabelecimentoId, origemSistema, COUNT(*) as total FROM atendimentos_unificados GROUP BY estabelecimentoId, origemSistema UNION ALL SELECT 'sem_conta' as tabela, estabelecimentoId, origemSistema, COUNT(*) as total FROM atendimentos_sem_conta GROUP BY estabelecimentoId, origemSistema UNION ALL SELECT 'a_faturar' as tabela, estabelecimentoId, origemSistema, COUNT(*) as total FROM atendimentos_a_faturar GROUP BY estabelecimentoId, origemSistema UNION ALL SELECT 'warleine_staging' as tabela, estabelecimentoId, 'WARLEINE' as origemSistema, COUNT(*) as total FROM warleine_atendimentos_staging GROUP BY estabelecimentoId) ORDER BY tabela, estabelecimentoId
